item.name: Whirlpool Turban
item.description:
Legend has it that this spiral wavekin possesses dominion over water, whipping up violent whirlpools and lacerating fishing vessels to shreds...but it is, at least, a very charming little shell.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The unique grooves on these wavekin's spiral shells are believed to disrupt ocean currents, creating whirlpools wheresoever they bob in shallow tides. The fishers of Kugane pay little attention to cautionary tales surrounding them, however, as the flesh pairs exceedingly well with soy sauce.
